description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build:backend job using the rustlang/rust:nightly image that runs rustc --version, cargo --version, cd api, cargo build --release --bin river-rss, cargo build --release --bin migrate, mkdir -p dist/, and cp ./src/ci/service_start.sh ../target/release/migrate ../target/release/river-rss dist/, caches the target/ directory under key backend, and stores the api/dist/ directory as a one‑week artifact. Also add a build:frontend job using the node:latest image that runs node --version, npm --version, cd web, npm install, npx parcel build index.html --public-url ./, caches web/node_modules/ under key frontend, and saves web/dist/ as a one‑week artifact. In the deploy stage add a deploy job using the alpine image that runs only on the master branch, installs rsync and openssh via apk, creates ~/.ssh, writes $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY to ~/.ssh/id_dsa with mode 600, disables strict host key checking, and rsyncs ./api/dist/ to $BACKEND_DEPLOY_DESTINATION and ./web/dist/ to $FRONTEND_DEPLOY_DESTINATION.
